stats.label: Strength
stats.description:
It measures **physical power** and **muscle**, governing both the capacity to **lift** and **carry heavy loads** and **the force behind melee strikes**.

*Some example actions who use this are:*
- Athletics
- Melee attacks
- Breaking objects

stats.label: Dexterity
stats.description:
It measures **agility**, **reflexes**, and **balance**, encompassing both **fine motor skills** and **gross motor coordination**.

*Some example actions who use this are:*
- Acrobatics
- Stealth
- Sleight of hand

stats.label: Constitution
stats.description:
It measures **endurance** and **bodily resilience**, governing the ability to **withstand physical punishment**, **resist disease**, and **push beyond normal limits**.

*Some example actions who use this are:*
- Holding breath
- Surviving harsh environments
- Resisting poison or disease

stats.label: Intelligence
stats.description:
It measures **reasoning**, **memory**, and **analytical thinking**, governing the capacity to **recall knowledge**, **solve problems**, and **understand complex systems**.

*Some example actions who use this are:*
- Arcana & History
- Investigation
- Identifying magical items

stats.label: Wisdom
stats.description:
It measures **perception**, **intuition**, and **willpower**, **governing awareness of the world** and the ability to **read situations** and **resist mental influence**.

*Some example actions who use this are:*
- Perception & Insight
- Survival
- Medicine

stats.label: Charisma
stats.description:
It measures **force of personality**, **persuasiveness**, and **social presence**, governing the ability to **influence**, **deceive**, or **inspire** others.

*Some example actions who use this are:*
- Persuasion & Deception
- Intimidation
- Performance

classes.name: Barbarian
classes.description: A **warrior powered by rage** that unlocks his true capacities, mainly a active user of **brute force** developed by his **low usage of reason**, good at **carrying heavy stuff**, **destroying hard stuff** and **generating fear** on his enemies.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: A stealth agent, dedicated to being agile, not so strong but having a great ability of hiding in plain view, silent, agile and efficient.

skills.name: Acrobatics
skills.description: It determines your ability to stay balanced, navigate tricky terrain, and perform physical stunts

traits.description: You gain **Heroic Inspiration** whenever you finish a Long Rest.
traits.name: Resourceful

traits.description: You gain proficiency in one skill of your choice.
traits.name: Skillful

traits.description: You gain an Origin feat of your choice.
traits.name: Versatile

species.description:
Found throughout the multiverse, humans are as varied as they are numerous, and they endeavor to achieve as much as they can in the years they are given. Their ambition and resourcefulness are commended, respected, and feared on many worlds.

Humans are as diverse in appearance as the people of Earth, and they have many gods. Scholars dispute the origin of humanity, but one of the earliest known human gatherings is said to have occurred in Sigil, the torus-shaped city at the center of the multiverse and the place where the Common language was born. From there, humans could have spread to every part of the multiverse, bringing the City of Doors’ cosmopolitanism with them.
species.name: Human
